title: Despite being in DMK alliance, DMDK works for AIADMK alliance: Edappadi Palaniswami and Anbumani
description: Mr. Palaniswami claimed the DMDK was indirectly supporting the AIADMK alliance. “Truth cannot be hidden. [DMDK leader] Premallatha Vijayakant is speaking the truth [her recent utterances on law and order], and we thank her,” he said.
